# The Invyte Co.

> India's most premium digital wedding invitation and wedding-website platform. We create cinematic, animated, mobile-first invitations with an envelope-opening reveal, live RSVP, QR invites, digital shagun (UPI), photo gallery, live countdown, and an AI wedding assistant. Sites are ready in minutes and fully editable from a no-code dashboard.

## What we offer
- Animated digital wedding invitations (websites, not static images)
- Templates for: Wedding, Engagement, Save the Date, Reception, Haldi, Mehendi, Sangeet
- 8+ luxury templates: Royal Gold, Ivory Bloom, Midnight Vows, Ring & Rose, Save Our Date, Crystal Hall, Haldi Sunshine, Heritage Maroon
- Features: envelope reveal animation, live RSVP with CSV export, QR code invites, digital shagun via UPI, photo gallery, guest wishes wall, live countdown, Google Maps + add-to-calendar, WhatsApp share, AI wedding assistant, dark/light theme, English + Hindi.

## Pricing (INR)
- Basic: ₹4,999 — single event, RSVP, mobile-first
- Premium: ₹6,999 — up to 3 events, gallery, countdown, QR invite, music
- Luxury: ₹9,999 (most popular) — full 6+ event suite, animated envelope, digital shagun, AI assistant
- Signature: ₹14,999 — custom colours/fonts, priority support, live streaming, wedding album site
- Add-ons: custom domain ₹499, premium music ₹999, additional event ₹999, video invite ₹1,499, luxury animated invite ₹1,999, guest gallery ₹999, digital shagun ₹1,499, wedding album site ₹2,999.

## How it works
1. Pick a template. 2. Add your details (names, photos, events, story). 3. Pay securely. 4. Share the live link with a QR invite. Ready in under 10 minutes.

## For vendors
Planners, photographers, decorators and venues earn 20% commission on referred orders. White-label available for studios.

## Contact
- Website: https://theinvyteco.com/
- WhatsApp / sales: available on the website
- Service area: India (English and Hindi)

## Key search terms we serve
digital wedding invitation, wedding website India, luxury wedding invitation, online wedding invite, animated wedding invitation, QR wedding invitation, save the date website, engagement invitation website, reception invitation, RSVP wedding website.
